trigger: The v1 complete at-most-three-switch family selected a unique three-switch boundary calendar and passed full deep replay.
purpose: Determine whether the exact best calibration calendar in the complete at-most-four-switch W24 family lies on the four-switch boundary.
scientific_scope: Comparator development on the same 60 already-burned calibration tapes only. No locked or virgin tape may be opened. This gate cannot estimate H_PI or H_obs, close M/T/R, authorize W24, or support a Paper 2 result.

candidate_family.definition: Every feasible 24-week active M/T/R calendar beginning in M, obeying the no-adjacent-switch rule, and containing at most four active-action switches.
candidate_family.enumeration_order: Stable lexicographic depth-first action order M,T,R, pruned immediately when a fifth switch would be required.

calibration.primary_selection: maximum exact sum of the 60 emitted binary64 ret_excel_visible_v1 values; arithmetic mean is display-only
calibration.tie_break: minimum candidate-family index among exact primary ties

selected_calendar_ledger.resource_interpretation: All candidates have the same 4032 response-team hours and identical reserve access rules. Realized reserve issue and replenishment are endogenous outcomes and are reported. Whether they consume a separate finite operational resource remains blocked on Garrido face validation.

vps_preflight.candidate_family: all 89131 candidates concurrently on calibration tapes 1100001 through 1100006
vps_preflight.failure_rule: Do not launch the producer if any threshold, hash, host, commit, watcher or stderr check fails.

decision_rules.boundary_active: If the exact selected calendar contains exactly four switches, report CALIBRATION_SWITCH4_BOUNDARY_ACTIVE. This is not automatic authorization for a fifth-switch or exact-W24 run; the next comparator step must be separately justified and frozen.
decision_rules.interior: If the exact selected calendar contains fewer than four switches, report CALIBRATION_SWITCH4_INTERIOR. This stops the switch-complexity sieve but does not prove that calendars with more switches cannot win.
